zh.Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Tailboys於大約1449年出生在英國林可爾史爾吉時，他的父親Sir William Tailboys35歲，母親Elizabeth Bonville25歲。他於1467年之前與Elizabeth Heron結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他在英國林可爾史爾被列為sheriff。他去世於1494年1月31日在他的家鄉享年46歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾吉。

zh-hans.Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 英国諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Tailboys于大约1449年出生在英国林可爾史爾吉时，他的父亲Sir William Tailboys35岁，母亲Elizabeth Bonville25岁。他于1467年之前与Elizabeth Heron结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他在英国林可爾史爾被列为sheriff。他去世于1494年1月31日在他的家乡享年46岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾吉。

nameMeanings.name: Tailboys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Talboys
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Taillebois (Orne).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Tailboys was born about 1449, in Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Sir William Tailboys, was 35 and his mother, Elizabeth Bonville, was 25. He married Elizabeth Heron before 1467. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. His occupation is listed as sheriff in Lincolnshire, England. He died on 31 January 1494, in his hometown, at the age of 46, and was buried in Kyme, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Tailboys est né environ 1449, à Kyme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Tailboys, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Bonville, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Heron avant 1467. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff à Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 31 janvier 1494, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Kyme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Tailboys um 1449 in Kyme, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Tailboys 35 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Bonville 25. Er hat vor 1467 Elizabeth Heron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als sheriff in Lincolnshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 31. Januar 1494 im Alter von 46 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Kyme, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Tailboys è nato il circa 1449 nel Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Tailboys, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Bonville, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Heron prima del 1467. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff nel Lincolnshire, England. Morì il 31 gennaio 1494, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Kyme, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.Lincolnshire, England: イギリスリンコルンシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Tailboysが約1449年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアクイメで生まれた時，父Sir William Tailboysは35歳，母Elizabeth Bonvilleは25歳であった。1467年以前にElizabeth Heronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。イギリスリンコルンシュアイアでの職業はsheriffと記録されている。彼は1494年1月31日に故郷で46歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアクイメにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Tailboys(이)가 대략 1449년 영국 링코실르 키에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Tailboys(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Bonville(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1467년 이전 Elizabeth Heron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 링코실르에서 sheriff이었다. 그는 1494년 1월 31일 그의 고향에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 키에 묻혔다.

mn.Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: Newcastle upon Tyne, Norðhymbra land, Английн

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Tailboys nasceu aproximadamente 1449, em Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Tailboys, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Bonville, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Heron antes 1467. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como sheriff em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 31 de janeiro de 1494, em sua cidade natal, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Tailboys родился около 1449 г. в местности ким, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Tailboys было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Bonville, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Heron перед 1467 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери.  Он работал по профессии sheriff в местности линколншир, Англия. Он умер 31 января 1494 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности ким, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Tailboys nació aproximadamente 1449, en Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Tailboys, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Bonville, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Heron antes de 1467. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era sheriff en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 31 de enero de 1494, en su pueblo, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
